metadata.name: Review and Post a Manual Journal Entry

description: A staff accountant has prepared a manual journal entry. A senior accountant needs to review it for accuracy and post it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the unposted journal entry from the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent opens the journal entry prepared by the staff accountant.

nodes.task_description: Review the journal entry for correctness, ensuring it has proper supporting documentation, the debits and credits are correct, and the amounts are accurate.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the entry and its support and confirms it is correct.

nodes.task_description: Post the journal entry to the general ledger.
